studies.title: Smartphone-assisted exposure therapy for panic disorder and agoraphobia: an effectiveness study

_verification.reason: The study specifically investigates the effectiveness of the Mindable app for exposure therapy in patients with panic disorder and agoraphobia. The product name 'Mindable' and the manufacturer 'Mindable Health' are explicitly mentioned in the full text.

_classification.reason: The document describes a study protocol for testing the effectiveness of a smartphone app for exposure therapy, but does not provide results or indicate that the study has been completed. Protocols without results are classified as INELIGIBLE.

studies._rejection_reason: The document describes a study protocol for testing the effectiveness of a smartphone app for exposure therapy, but does not provide results or indicate that the study has been completed. Protocols without results are classified as INELIGIBLE.
